ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution that developed the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "last_validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last validated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "health_authority" TEXT /* Name of the health authority responsible for the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases */,
  "predicted_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Predicted number of hospitalizations */,
  "predicted_deaths" INTEGER /* Predicted number of deaths */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the forecast */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the forecast */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., cases, percentage) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_forecasts" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical forecast */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases in the revision */,
  "predicted_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Predicted number of hospitalizations in the revision */,
  "predicted_deaths" INTEGER /* Predicted number of deaths in the revision */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of revision (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "revision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_forecasts_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast metadata entry */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the forecast */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the forecast */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the forecast */,
  "model_runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the model in seconds */,
  "computational_resources" TEXT /* Computational resources used for the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_metadata_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast file */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the forecast data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_files_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast update */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., data, methodology) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_updates_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast comparison */,
  "forecast_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first forecast in the comparison */,
  "forecast_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second forecast in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "comparison_metric" TEXT /* Name of the comparison metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "comparison_value" REAL /* Value of the comparison metric */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., accuracy, robustness) */,
  "comparison_description" TEXT /* Description of the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comparison was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comparison was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_comparisons_forecast_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id_2") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_comparisons_forecast_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id_1") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast application */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was applied */,
  "application_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., hospital, policy) */,
  "application_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_applications_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)
